ai.title: Football AI
ai.subtitle: Ask about football & World Cup 2026
ai.empty: Ask about a team, player, match, or WC 2026 — or type a player or club name and tap the card button for a card.
ai.unavailable: The AI assistant is currently unavailable.
ai.disclaimer: AI can be wrong; football knowledge may be out of date. Not affiliated with FIFA.
ai.mayBeOutdatedHint: From model knowledge — may not reflect recent moves.

history.title: My points
history.subtitle: Your predictions, results and points over time.
history.subtitleNamed: {{name}} · predictions, results and points over time.
history.empty: You haven't made any predictions yet.

auth.subtitle: Sign in to make predictions and climb the leaderboard.
auth.about: A private World Cup 2026 prediction pool for friends. Invite-only — this is not a public service.
auth.noSuchPlayer: No such player — ask an admin to add you.

predict.selectPlayer: Predict on behalf of a player

admin.playersSubtitle: Add or remove players who can sign in and predict.
admin.demoSubtitle: When on, new sign-ins can only browse until you grant them access below.

banner.none: You’re in preview mode — explore freely. An organizer needs to grant you access to see other players and join the pool.
banner.ro: You can view the pool but not play yet. Ask an organizer for full access to make predictions.

demo.lockedSeeOthers: This is locked in preview mode
demo.lockedParticipate: Playing is locked in preview mode
demo.lockedHint: Ask an organizer to grant you access.

competition.title: Competition
competition.subtitle: Live leaderboard and revealed predictions.
competition.legend: Exact — exact-score guesses · Bonus — champion/finalist/top-scorer points · Pts — grand total
competition.leaderboardEmpty: No scores yet — predictions reveal as matches kick off.
competition.revealLockedBody: Everyone’s predictions for this match unlock the moment it kicks off.

bonus.title: Bonus picks
bonus.tierHint: Pick during the group stage to lock in the most points — a pick made after the group stage is worth fewer. The pick stays open until the knockout rounds begin, but changing it re-stamps the time, so a late switch can drop your tier.
bonus.signInPrompt: Sign in to pick your champion.

scorers.empty: No goals yet — the board fills in once matches are played.
scorers.legend: Tournament top scorers · refreshed hourly from FIFA data

rules.title: How points are awarded
rules.exact: Exact score — you nailed the final score
rules.outcome: Correct result — right winner or a draw, but a different score
rules.knockout: Knockout match: if you predict a regulation draw, you also pick who advances (extra time / penalties); +1 for the right pick. With a decisive score the winner is already implied — no separate +1.
rules.knockoutExample: Knockout example: predict 1:1 in regular time AND that France advance → 3 (exact score) + 1 (advancer) = 4 points.
rules.championBonus: Champion bonus: pick the tournament winner below — choosing during the group stage is worth more than after it (time-tiered).
rules.bonusFinalist: Finalist (the other team in the final)
rules.bonusNote: Bonuses are awarded ONLY if your pick is correct, and only once the outcome is known. Picking earlier is worth more: full points during the group stage, fewer after groups. You can change a pick until the Round of 16 kicks off — then it locks.

audit.title: Audit
audit.subtitle: A public, read-only feed of activity.

groups.title: Groups
groups.subtitle: All 12 groups · standings update as matches finish

thirdPlace.title: Ranking of third-placed teams
thirdPlace.qualifyHint: Top 8 advance to the Round of 32

bracket.title: Bracket
bracket.subtitle: The road to the final · times in Kyiv
bracket.empty: The knockout bracket appears once the group stage wraps up.

matchDetail.title: Match detail
matchDetail.notAvailableBody: Match statistics appear here once the data arrives from FIFA. Check back after kickoff.
matchDetail.errorBody: Check your connection and try again.

empty.title: Syncing the calendar…
empty.body: Matches will appear as soon as the data arrives from FIFA. Check back shortly.

error.title: Couldn’t load the calendar
error.body: Check your connection and try again.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.description: The leaderboard will appear once the matches kick off and the first predictions come in.

bracket.title: Bracket
bracket.description: The interactive knockout bracket opens after the group stage wraps up.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The link may be out of date. Head back to the calendar.
